use_cases: Landing pages for fintech credit card products with interactive 3D card displays
Payment and financial service product showcases with animated card imagery
SaaS landing pages for payment processing services requiring visual impact
E-commerce checkout or payment flow entry points with branded hero sections
Banking application hero sections featuring credit card previews
ai_summary: An interactive hero component featuring 3D perspective transforms that respond to mouse movement, displaying credit card imagery with smooth spring animations. Includes customizable headline, subtext, and call-to-action button for showcasing fintech products, payment services, and e-commerce payment flows.
